forecast-period.text: Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 11 and 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 15.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning westerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 17.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the evening. Winds west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late morning and afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning westerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog in the north. Slight chance of a shower. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning westerly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the morning then becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h turning southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers near the coast, medium chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning westerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers in the south, high chance elsewhere. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 14.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h turning southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h early in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning westerly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h turning southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog near the eastern border. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h turning southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the southwest, slight chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Mostly sunny morning. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the afternoon. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the evening. Winds westerly 30 to 45 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 12 and 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h turning southwesterly in the early morning then decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 15.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the west, slight chance elsewhere. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 17.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the north. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.
Cloudy. High chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm west of the ranges in the evening. Winds westerly 30 to 45 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 13 and 18.
Sun protection 12:00pm to 1:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Winds westerly 25 to 40 km/h turning southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 16.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Hawker in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.
Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog west of the ranges. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers east of Ceduna, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm south of Streaky Bay in the evening. Winds westerly 25 to 40 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 17 and 20.
Sun protection 11:50am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h turning southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog west of Ceduna. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower south of Streaky Bay, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning westerly 25 to 35 km/h in the morning. Daytime maximum temperatures between 16 and 19.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h turning southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h before dawn then decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the evening. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds northwest to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the afternoon. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Mostly sunny. High chance of showers south of Woomera, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds westerly 25 to 40 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 19 and 22.
Sun protection 10:40am to 2:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera, most likely in the early morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending south to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h in the late morning and afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog west of Coober Pedy. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Woomera. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.

Mostly sunny. High chance of showers south of Yunta, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 17 and 23.
Sun protection 10:50am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. Medium chance of showers south of Yunta, most likely in the early morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h turning southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h during the morning then decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 22.

Partly cloudy. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending south to southeasterly during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.

Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
